endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.DataLakeAnalytics/accounts
endpoints.description: Gets the first page of Data Lake Analytics accounts, if any, within the current subscription. This includes a link to the next page, if any.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.DataLakeAnalytics/accounts
endpoints.description: Gets the first page of Data Lake Analytics accounts, if any, within a specific resource group. This includes a link to the next page, if any.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.DataLakeAnalytics/accounts/{accountName}
endpoints.description: Gets details of the specified Data Lake Analytics account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ACCOUNTNAME}} with a real accountname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.DataLakeAnalytics/accounts/{accountName}
endpoints.description: Begins the delete process for the Data Lake Analytics account object specified by the account name.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ACCOUNTNAME}} with a real accountname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.DataLakeAnalytics/accounts/{accountName}/DataLakeStoreAccounts/
endpoints.description: Gets the first page of Data Lake Store accounts linked to the specified Data Lake Analytics account. The response includes a link to the next page, if any.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ACCOUNTNAME}} with a real accountname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.DataLakeAnalytics/accounts/{accountName}/DataLakeStoreAccounts/{dataLakeStoreAccountName}
endpoints.description: Gets the specified Data Lake Store account details in the specified Data Lake Analytics account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ACCOUNTNAME}} with a real accountname. Replace {{DATALAKESTOREACCOUNTNAME}} with a real datalakestoreaccountname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.DataLakeAnalytics/accounts/{accountName}/DataLakeStoreAccounts/{dataLakeStoreAccountName}
endpoints.description: Updates the specified Data Lake Analytics account to include the additional Data Lake Store account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ACCOUNTNAME}} with a real accountname. Replace {{DATALAKESTOREACCOUNTNAME}} with a real datalakestoreaccountname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.DataLakeAnalytics/accounts/{accountName}/DataLakeStoreAccounts/{dataLakeStoreAccountName}
endpoints.description: Updates the Data Lake Analytics account specified to remove the specified Data Lake Store account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ACCOUNTNAME}} with a real accountname. Replace {{DATALAKESTOREACCOUNTNAME}} with a real datalakestoreaccountname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.DataLakeAnalytics/accounts/{accountName}/StorageAccounts/
endpoints.description: Gets the first page of Azure Storage accounts, if any, linked to the specified Data Lake Analytics account. The response includes a link to the next page, if any.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ACCOUNTNAME}} with a real accountname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.DataLakeAnalytics/accounts/{accountName}/StorageAccounts/{storageAccountName}
endpoints.description: Gets the specified Azure Storage account linked to the given Data Lake Analytics account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ACCOUNTNAME}} with a real accountname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{STORAGEACCOUNTNAME}} with a real storageaccountname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.DataLakeAnalytics/accounts/{accountName}/StorageAccounts/{storageAccountName}
endpoints.description: Updates the specified Data Lake Analytics account to add an Azure Storage account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ACCOUNTNAME}} with a real accountname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{STORAGEACCOUNTNAME}} with a real storageaccountname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.DataLakeAnalytics/accounts/{accountName}/StorageAccounts/{storageAccountName}
endpoints.description: Updates the specified Data Lake Analytics account to remove an Azure Storage account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ACCOUNTNAME}} with a real accountname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{STORAGEACCOUNTNAME}} with a real storageaccountname.

endpoints.name: PATCH /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.DataLakeAnalytics/accounts/{accountName}/StorageAccounts/{storageAccountName}
endpoints.description: Updates the Data Lake Analytics account to replace Azure Storage blob account details, such as the access key and/or suffix.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ACCOUNTNAME}} with a real accountname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{STORAGEACCOUNTNAME}} with a real storageaccountname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.DataLakeAnalytics/accounts/{accountName}/StorageAccounts/{storageAccountName}/Containers
endpoints.description: Lists the Azure Storage containers, if any, associated with the specified Data Lake Analytics and Azure Storage account combination. The response includes a link to the next page of results, if any.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ACCOUNTNAME}} with a real accountname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{STORAGEACCOUNTNAME}} with a real storageaccountname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.DataLakeAnalytics/accounts/{accountName}/StorageAccounts/{storageAccountName}/Containers/{containerName}
endpoints.description: Gets the specified Azure Storage container associated with the given Data Lake Analytics and Azure Storage accounts.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{CONTAINERNAME}} with a real containername. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ACCOUNTNAME}} with a real accountname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{STORAGEACCOUNTNAME}} with a real storageaccountname.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.DataLakeAnalytics/accounts/{accountName}/StorageAccounts/{storageAccountName}/Containers/{containerName}/listSasTokens
endpoints.description: Gets the SAS token associated with the specified Data Lake Analytics and Azure Storage account and container combination.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{CONTAINERNAME}} with a real containername. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ACCOUNTNAME}} with a real accountname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{STORAGEACCOUNTNAME}} with a real storageaccountname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.DataLakeAnalytics/accounts/{name}
endpoints.description: Creates the specified Data Lake Analytics account. This supplies the user with computation services for Data Lake Analytics workloads
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: PATCH /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.DataLakeAnalytics/accounts/{name}
endpoints.description: Updates the Data Lake Analytics account object specified by the accountName with the contents of the account object.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.
